input.headline: Garda among six arrested over missing €100k drug seizure

raw.headline: Garda among six arrested over missing €100k drug seizure

winner: A Garda officer was arrested for losing a briefcase of confiscated drugs—turns out he left it in his back pocket during the handover ceremony. "I thought 'no one checks the back pockets of a cop,'" he sighed. The court ordered him to repay €100,000 in seized cash—all his own money now, since the drugs just disappeared into evidence.

candidates.text: A Garda officer was arrested for losing a briefcase of confiscated drugs—turns out he left it in his back pocket during the handover ceremony. "I thought 'no one checks the back pockets of a cop,'" he sighed. The court ordered him to repay €100,000 in seized cash—all his own money now, since the drugs just disappeared into evidence.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist with a specific scenario, good use of irony and wordplay, concise and natural English."}

candidates.text: I was robbed of my drug money, so I hired a garda to catch me—turns out he was in on it!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clever with the twist involving the garda, but it's a bit forced and lacks specificity to the headline's context."}

candidates.text: I can't believe the Garda found that missing 100k in a drug bust—turns out they just needed a better lock!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat surprising and specific to the headline, but the humor is weak and relies on a clichéd 'better lock' punchline that doesn't fully connect with the situation described."}

candidates.text: A garda was arrested for losing a drug shipment—turns out, they left their badge at home.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat surprising and specific to the headline, but the humor is weak and relies on a clichéd 'left their badge at home' punchline that feels forced and not particularly funny."}

candidates.text: Why did the Garda officer bring a ladder to the crime scene? Because he heard there was a *stolen* amount of cash!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 4.5, "reason": "The joke is weak and only loosely related to the headline. It lacks surprise and specificity, and the pun on 'stolen' doesn't clearly connect to the missing drug seizure or the Garda's involvement."}
